name: Rohan Verma
interest: No-code app builder for client projects
reason: Waiting for Q2 retainer budget to free up
notes: Digital agency with 12 clients. Loved the white-label feature. Said they build 3-4 apps per month for clients and Appy Pie would replace their dev costs completely

name: Ananya Sharma
reason: Engineering team was rebuilding their stack internally
notes: D2C fashion brand with 2M customers. Wanted a loyalty app fast without waiting 6 months for devs. Very engaged - ran a 2-week trial

name: Karan Mehta
interest: No-code course and tutor app builder
reason: Budget cycle ends in June - said call back then
notes: EdTech SaaS helping coaching institutes go digital. Wanted to let their clients build their own apps. Strong product fit. Did a full demo

name: Priya Nair
interest: Chatbot and lead capture for wedding vendors
reason: Team restructuring after Series B - new CTO came in
notes: Wedding marketplace with 200k vendors. New CTO wants to evaluate all tools fresh. Previously loved the chatbot builder feature

name: Suresh Iyer
interest: Property listing and appointment booking app
reason: Chose a competitor (Glide Apps) but said they were unhappy after 2 months
notes: Real estate platform with 7M users. Went with Glide on price but complained about limited templates. Now actively looking again

name: Divya Kapoor
interest: Customer engagement app for D2C wellness brand
reason: Headcount freeze - only 3 person tech team and no bandwidth
notes: Fast-growing D2C brand for nutrition and personal care. Team is tiny and needs no-code badly. Very warm initial conversation

name: Amit Saxena
reason: Said they needed GPS and IoT integrations we do not support
notes: B2B logistics marketplace connecting truck owners with shippers. Went cold on integration gap. Worth revisiting if integrations have improved

name: Neha Gupta
interest: Internal HR and compliance tracking app
reason: Compliance team flagged no-code tools as a security risk for banking data
notes: Large private sector bank. IT policy does not allow external no-code platforms. Very unlikely to convert without enterprise data residency

name: Sanjay Kulkarni
interest: Field service and maintenance tracking app
reason: Ghosted after pricing call - no response to 3 follow-ups
notes: Industrial equipment manufacturer. Needs deep IoT and SCADA integration which no-code cannot support. Not a realistic fit for Appy Pie

name: Ritu Sharma
reason: Said they need HIPAA-grade hosting and custom EHR integration
notes: Large hospital chain with 23 facilities. Requires clinical workflow integrations and enterprise compliance that goes beyond Appy Pie capabilities
